auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Docparser API key sent with the api_key header. Open your parser, go to More > Integrations, and copy the parser API key from the official integration settings.

actions.name: fetch_document_from_url
actions.description: Queue a publicly accessible document URL for import into a Docparser parser and return the scheduled document metadata.

parserId.description: The parser identifier to import the document into.

url.description: The publicly accessible document URL to fetch.

remoteId.description: An optional passthrough ID that is stored with the fetched document.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a document into Docparser from a public URL.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the fetched document.

parserId.description: The parser identifier the document was queued against.

anyOf.description: The passthrough remote ID returned by Docparser.

message.description: The upstream status message, which usually contains a status URL.

outputSchema.description: Normalized metadata returned after queuing a URL import in Docparser.

actions.name: get_document_result
actions.description: Retrieve the parsed data of one Docparser document. When child documents exist and are included, multiple result rows may be returned.

parserId.description: The parser identifier that owns the document.

documentId.description: The unique document identifier returned during import.

format.description: The output format for parsed data. `object` returns nested JSON and `flat` returns flattened key/value pairs.

includeChildren.description: Whether parsed data of child documents should also be returned.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving parsed data of one Docparser document.

id.description: The unique identifier of the parsed result.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the source document.

anyOf.description: The passthrough remote ID associated with the document.
The original file name of the source document.
The standard Docparser media link for the document.
The original-file media link for the document.
The parsed-data media link for the document.
The page count of the parsed document.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document finished processing.

items.description: A normalized parsed-document result returned by Docparser.

results.description: The parsed result rows returned by Docparser for the requested document.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the get_document_result action.

actions.name: get_document_status
actions.description: Retrieve the import, preprocessing, parsing, and webhook-dispatch status of one Docparser document.

parserId.description: The parser identifier that owns the document.

documentId.description: The unique document identifier returned during import.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Docparser document status.

token.description: The document token returned by Docparser.

anyOf.description: The passthrough remote ID linked to the document.
The import source reported by Docparser, such as `api`.
The original file name reported by Docparser.
The detected MIME type of the document.

pages.description: The page count reported by Docparser.

supported.description: Whether the file type is supported by Docparser.

importingInProgress.description: Whether the document import is still running.

processingInProgress.description: Whether the parser is still processing the document.

webhookDispatchingInProgress.description: Whether webhook dispatch is still running.

uploadedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when the document was uploaded.

importedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when the document import finished.

ocrStartedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when OCR started.

preprocessedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when preprocessing finished.

preprocessingInProgressAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when preprocessing started.

processedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when parsing completed.

firstProcessedAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when parsing first completed.

dispatchedWebhook.description: Whether a webhook was dispatched successfully.

dispatchedWebhookAt.description: The Unix timestamp in seconds when the webhook was dispatched.

dispatchedWebhookProblem.description: Whether webhook dispatch encountered a problem.

webhooksCreated.description: The number of queued webhooks created.

webhooksSent.description: The number of webhooks successfully sent.

failedJobs.description: The background jobs that failed for this document.

status.description: Normalized status information for a Docparser document.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the get_document_status action.

actions.name: get_multiple_document_results
actions.description: Retrieve parsed data for multiple documents of a specific parser with optional filtering, pagination, queue inclusion, and sorting.

parserId.description: The parser identifier to read results from.

format.description: The output format for parsed data. `object` returns nested JSON and `flat` returns flattened key/value pairs.

list.description: The upstream result list mode used to filter which documents are returned.

limit.description: The maximum number of result rows to return.

date.description: The ISO 8601 or Unix timestamp filter used with `uploaded_after` or `processed_after` list modes.

remoteId.description: Restrict results to documents with this remote ID.

includeProcessingQueue.description: Whether in-progress documents should also be included in the result set.

sortBy.description: The timestamp field used to sort multiple-document results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction used for multiple-document results.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving parsed data of multiple Docparser documents.

id.description: The unique identifier of the parsed result.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the source document.

anyOf.description: The passthrough remote ID associated with the document.
The original file name of the source document.
The standard Docparser media link for the document.
The original-file media link for the document.
The parsed-data media link for the document.
The page count of the parsed document.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document finished processing.

items.description: A normalized parsed-document result returned by Docparser.

results.description: The parsed result rows returned by Docparser.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the get_multiple_document_results action.

actions.name: get_parser_models
actions.description: List all model layouts for a specific Docparser parser.

parserId.description: The parser identifier to list model layouts for.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving parser model layouts.

id.description: The unique identifier of the parser model layout.

label.description: The human-readable label of the parser model layout.

items.description: A model layout attached to a specific Docparser parser.

models.description: The parser model layouts returned by Docparser.

outputSchema.description: The normalized parser model list returned by Docparser.

actions.name: list_parsers
actions.description: List all Document Parsers linked to the current Docparser account.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the parser.

items.description: A Document Parser linked to the current Docparser account.

outputSchema.description: The normalized parser list returned by Docparser.

actions.name: ping
actions.description: Ping the Docparser API to verify that the provided API key is valid.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

msg.description: The upstream confirmation message. Docparser returns `pong`.

outputSchema.description: The normalized ping response returned by Docparser.

actions.name: reintegrate_documents
actions.description: Schedule one or more Docparser documents for the integration queue using their document IDs.

parserId.description: The parser identifier that owns the documents.

documentIds.description: The document identifiers to schedule for reintegration.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for scheduling documents for reintegration.

totalReintegrate.description: The number of documents Docparser scheduled for reintegration.

anyOf.description: The upstream message returned by Docparser.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the reintegrate_documents action.

actions.name: reparse_documents
actions.description: Schedule one or more Docparser documents for re-parsing using their document IDs.

parserId.description: The parser identifier that owns the documents.

documentIds.description: The document identifiers to schedule for re-parsing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for scheduling documents for re-parsing.

totalReparsed.description: The number of documents Docparser scheduled for re-parsing.

anyOf.description: The upstream message returned by Docparser.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the reparse_documents action.

actions.name: upload_document_by_content
actions.description: Upload a document to a Docparser parser by sending base64-encoded file content and an optional file name.

parserId.description: The parser identifier to upload the document to.

contentBase64.description: The base64-encoded document content to upload.

fileName.description: The file name to attribute to the uploaded document.

remoteId.description: An optional passthrough ID that is stored with the document.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a document by base64 content.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the imported document.

anyOf.description: The imported file size in bytes when Docparser returns it.
The amount of account quota consumed by the import.
The remaining account quota after the import.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the account quota refills.

outputSchema.description: Normalized import metadata returned after uploading a document to Docparser.
